case_title: JONATHAN MONTERROSO VS. CORNELIUS LOMONT TAYLOR II

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR OEX SERVICE:$NOT GIVEN); REMARKS: PER CURRENT RESIDENT RESPONDENT DOES NOT LIVE AT ADDRESS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF MONTERROSO, JONATHAN AS TO DEFENDANT TAYLOR II, CORNELIUS LOMONT

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-03-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-03-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF JONATHAN MONTERROSO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CORNELIUS LOMONT TAYLOR II IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE IS ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,982.65 FILED BY MONTERROSO, JONATHAN AS TO DEFENDANT TAYLOR II, CORNELIUS LOMONT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-03-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-03-2022 - JUDGMENT.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT TAYLOR II, CORNELIUS LOMONT HEARING SET FOR OCT-03-2022 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF OCT-03-2022 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO APPEARANCES. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $40/SHERIFF) SERVED APR-01-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TAYLOR II, CORNELIUS LOMONT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONTERROSO, JONATHAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAYLOR II, CORNELIUS LOMONT $4,482.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,597.00, DEFENDANT IS AT FAULT FOR THE ACCIDENT. AMOUNT WAS REDUCED BECAUSE THE PLAINTIFF WAS PAID FROM HIS INSURANCE COMPANY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER OF EXAMINATION. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
